title: Decision: OAuth 2.0 PKCE Migration
content_summary: Decision to migrate from implicit OAuth flow to PKCE. Driven by security audit findings in Q1. All new integrations must use PKCE. Existing integrations have 90-day sunset.
author: Sarah Chen

decision_log.title: Adopt OAuth 2.0 PKCE for all auth flows
decision_log.decision: Migrate all OAuth integrations to PKCE flow. Implicit flow deprecated as of 2026-07-01.
decision_log.rationale: Security audit identified implicit flow as vulnerable to token interception. PKCE eliminates this attack vector.
alternatives_considered: Keep implicit flow with additional mitigations

title: Token Expiry Compliance Change — NO DECISION LOG
content_summary: Working notes on reducing token TTL from 72h to 24h. Compliance requirement from legal. Horizon must update their token storage. Decision has not been formally logged.
author: Sarah Chen
